dcterms:dc.dc:title: A Test Collection for Matching Patient to Clinical Trials
dcterms:dc.dc:creator: Bevan Koopman
dcterms:dc.dc:subject: Information retrieval and web search
dcterms:dc.dc:description:
The following is an information retrieval test collection that contains:
* 204,855 publicly available clinical trails was crawled from ClinicalTrials.gov. * 60 topics made up of three types: patient case descriptions, patient case summaries and assessor provided ad-hoc queries, totalling an average of 10.2 queries per topic. * 4,000 assessor provided relevance assessment for topic, trial pairs.
Further details about the test collection can be found in the following publication:
B. Koopman and G. Zuccon. *A test collection for matching patient trials*. In Proceedings of the 39th annual international ACM SIGIR conference on research and development in information retrieval, Pisa, July 2016.
